text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I visit the gym to find Biwa Hayahide,<n>Winning
Ticket, and Narita Taishin all<n>there.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, Professor Hayahideeee!<n>You gotta help
meee!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's the matter, Ticket?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I tried reading the training books you<n>brought
over, but they're all gibberish<n>to me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Says here, um, ki... kinetic strength is<n>needed for
acceleration? And<n>apparently, I have to do kinetic<n>
training or something like that?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What's all that mean? Is it some kind<n>of spell?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's not a spell—it's theory. I suppose<n>I should
elucidate the text for you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. Think of kinetic muscular<n>strength as an
explosion—the ability to<n>explode with power in a
single<n>moment.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now how does one foster such<n>power? One must
train their fast-twitch<n>muscles.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Fast-twitch muscles generally refer to<n>external or
"outer" muscles. Training<n>them can lead to
enhanced explosive<n>power.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And how does one train their<n>fast-twitch
muscles? Through kinetic<n>training. Strength
training is a prime<n>example of this.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That concludes my explanation. I<n>believe I was
logical and to the point,<n>but did you comprehend
it?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh, I'm so LOST! My head's<n>spinning like
crazy!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm, it'd be quicker if I gave you a<n>clear
demonstration...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes. I know just the thing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: See that barbell over there, Ticket?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? That heavy-looking thing?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's the one. It weighs<n>approximately 200
kilograms.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Most wouldn't be able to lift that<n>without solid
muscle strength.<n>However...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Given my daily weight training<n>sessions and
following the book's<n>logic, I should be able to lift
it with<n>ease.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Because, as I've previously<n>explained, logic is
absolute.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, really?! Wow, that's some<n>impressive
stuff! Show me, show me!<n>Pleeeaaase!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Watch closely and behold<n>the
effectiveness of logic-based<n>training.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh, you sure about that?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! I shall gradually lower my hips<n>from my
starting position.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now, watch... You see how my thighs<n>and calves
form a perfect<n>ninety-degree angle?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
As long as I... maintain this for... five<n>seconds!
Then!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: One... two... three!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh! Theoretically speaking...<n>failure is
impossible!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Wheeze... See?Perfectly executed! The logic wasflawless!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! That was amazing! Your<n>logic power is
awesooome!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna give that theory thingy a<n>shot! I'll train
enough to lift a<n>100-kilogram barbell!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it pleases me that you have<n>come to
understand the importance of<n>theory. Let's
continue to support each<n>other in our endeavors.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Theory? Logic? Wasn't that just all<n>muscle?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Gnaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Urk... I disappoint myself!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, looks like your logicy-ness<n>didn't work
out...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No! Failure is theoretically impossible!<n>The logic is
flawless!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I shall lift this barbell at all costs! The<n>theory must
be demonstrated in full!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Uh... I'm pretty sure this isn't about<n>logic and
more about pure muscle...
